home.subtitle: Imported Grade-A Pine, Plywood, and Construction Timber. We supply the foundation for your masterpiece.
home.cta_desc: Get exclusive wholesale pricing for bulk orders. We offer special rates for contractors and furniture factories.

hero.title: BUILD WITH
hero.description: Thailand's trusted partner for structural pine, marine plywood, and engineering timber. Quality you can rely on.

services.title: Industrial Grade Materials
services.construction_desc: High-strength timber perfectly suited for structural framing, roofing, and formwork. ISO certified durability.
services.plywood_desc: Direct factory supply of Marine, Commercial, and Film-faced plywood for contractors and dealers.
services.delivery_desc: We own our logistics fleet. Same-day delivery available for Bangkok & Perimeter areas.

about.hero_subtitle: Since 1995, we've been Thailand's trusted partner for premium pine wood, plywood, and construction materials.
about.story_subtitle: From Humble Beginnings to Industry Leader
about.story_content:
Sakwood was founded with a simple mission: to provide Thailand's construction and furniture industries with the highest quality wood materials at competitive prices. What started as a small family business has grown into one of the country's leading timber suppliers, serving thousands of contractors, furniture manufacturers, and DIY enthusiasts nationwide.

Over the years, we've built strong relationships with international suppliers, allowing us to source premium Grade-A pine and plywood from sustainable forests around the world. Our commitment to quality, reliability, and customer service has earned us the trust of clients across Thailand.
about.mission_subtitle: Driven by Purpose, Guided by Values
about.mission_desc: To provide Thailand's construction and furniture industries with premium quality wood materials at competitive prices, while maintaining the highest standards of customer service and environmental responsibility.
about.vision_desc: To be the most trusted and preferred wood supplier in Southeast Asia, known for our commitment to quality, sustainability, and customer satisfaction.
about.values_subtitle: The principles that guide everything we do
about.values_quality_desc: We never compromise on quality. Every piece of wood we supply meets our rigorous standards for strength, durability, and appearance.
about.values_integrity_desc: We believe in honest business practices, transparent pricing, and delivering on our promises. Your trust is our most valuable asset.
about.values_sustainability_desc: We're committed to responsible sourcing from certified sustainable forests, ensuring that our operations contribute to a greener future.
about.values_service_desc: Our dedicated team goes above and beyond to ensure every customer receives personalized attention and support throughout their journey with us.
about.cta_desc: Whether you're building a home, furnishing a space, or working on a commercial project, we have the quality materials you need. Let's build something great together.
